description: Governed contract registry for all public RPCs. Every RPC in expected_surface.json and execute_allowlist.json must have an entry here. Enforced by CI gate rpc-contract-registry (Build Route 10.6).

rpcs.name: create_deal_v1
rpcs.notes: CONFLICT on duplicate deal id. No VALIDATION_ERROR — inputs are permissive.

rpcs.name: create_share_token_v1
rpcs.notes: VALIDATION_ERROR on null/past/future>90d expires_at or null deal_id. NOT_FOUND on deal not in tenant. CONFLICT on cardinality limit (50 active tokens).

rpcs.name: foundation_log_activity_v1
rpcs.notes: SECURITY DEFINER. Called best-effort by other RPCs. Best-effort — caller catches exceptions.

rpcs.name: list_deals_v1
rpcs.notes: Schema governed by Build Route 10.3. p_limit clamped [1,100] default 25.

rpcs.name: lookup_share_token_v1
rpcs.notes: NOT_FOUND returned for all failure cases (revoked, expired, nonexistent, bad format) — no existence leak.

rpcs.name: revoke_share_token_v1
rpcs.notes: Idempotent. Revocation of already-revoked or nonexistent token returns OK.

rpcs.name: update_deal_v1
rpcs.notes: CONFLICT on row version mismatch or deal not found for tenant.

rpcs.name: resolve_form_slug_v1
rpcs.notes: Anon-callable per CONTRACTS.md §12 controlled exception. Resolves slug + form_type to tenant_id. NOT_FOUND for invalid slug, invalid form_type, or nonexistent slug — no existence leak between form types.

rpcs.name: submit_form_v1
rpcs.notes: Anon-callable per CONTRACTS.md §12 controlled exception. Resolves tenant from slug. VALIDATION_ERROR on missing spam_token, invalid form_type, or null payload. NOT_FOUND on invalid slug. Seller submissions create draft deal with asking_price and repair_estimate pre-filled.

rpcs.name: list_reminders_v1
rpcs.notes: Returns overdue and upcoming reminders for current tenant. completed_at IS NULL filter. items always array.

rpcs.name: create_reminder_v1
rpcs.notes: Min role: member. VALIDATION_ERROR on null deal_id, reminder_date, or reminder_type. NOT_FOUND if deal not in tenant. require_min_role_v1 exception caught and returned as JSON envelope.

rpcs.name: complete_reminder_v1
rpcs.notes: Min role: member. Idempotent -- completing already-completed reminder returns OK. Cross-tenant call is no-op (tenant isolation enforced by WHERE clause).
